commits.subject: fix(security): add sandbox attribute to script-embed iframe in embed.js
commits.body:
The EmbedCodeDialog iframe snippet was sandboxed in the previous commit,
but the script embed path (embed.js) creates iframes dynamically without
sandbox. This adds the same sandbox restrictions to the recommended embed
method for consistent security across both embed paths.

sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms"

Verified: postMessage auto-resize, isEmbedMode() detection, Supabase
auth cookies, and form JavaScript all work within these sandbox rules.

Tags: security, embed

commits.subject: fix(security): comprehensive code review audit — 13 fixes across 15 files
commits.body:
Security fixes:
- CSV formula injection: prefix formula-triggering chars with tab (CWE-1236)
- ReDoS: reject nested-quantifier regex patterns, cap input length (CWE-1333)
- Embed postMessage: validate origin, cap max height to prevent UI abuse
- Debug pill: gate behind import.meta.env.DEV to prevent data leak in production
- Embed code: HTML-encode slug to prevent injection in copy-pasted snippets
- Debug report: redact URL query params to avoid leaking tokens/hidden field values

Race condition fixes:
- Auto-save: read definition from store at save-time (not stale closure),
  only clear isDirty if definition unchanged during async save
- ResponsesPage optimistic update: capture pre-update state via functional
  updater to avoid stale closure on concurrent status changes
- All page fetches: add AbortController to prevent state updates after unmount

Memory leak fixes:
- Auto-save: replace unbounded timeout array with single refs per purpose
- Timer cleanup on unmount is now deterministic (2 refs vs N-length array)

Other fixes:
- ID generation: use crypto.randomUUID() instead of Date.now() to prevent
  collisions on rapid operations
- API client: accept optional AbortSignal on all methods
- BuilderPage: add e.returnValue for cross-browser beforeunload compat

commits.subject: fix(deploy): add GitHub Pages deployment workflow and fix base paths
commits.body:
GitHub Pages was not deploying because:
1. No GitHub Actions workflow existed to build and deploy
2. Vite had no `base` config — assets loaded from `/` instead of `/four-ems/`
3. No 404.html for SPA routing — React Router deep links returned 404
4. BrowserRouter had no basename — routes didn't match under /four-ems/
5. PWA manifest scope/start_url pointed to `/` instead of `/four-ems/`
6. Embed code dialog used `window.location.origin` without base path

Added:
- .github/workflows/deploy.yml — builds on push to main, deploys via
  actions/deploy-pages (artifact-based, GitHub's recommended approach)
- public/404.html — redirects to index.html preserving path for SPA routing
- index.html restore script — converts 404 redirect query back to real path

Fixed:
- vite.config.ts: added `base: '/four-ems/'` and updated PWA manifest paths
- src/main.tsx: added `basename="/four-ems"` to BrowserRouter
- BuilderPage.tsx: embed baseUrl now includes BASE_URL from Vite
